questions.question: Insert the following records into the table: Student ID, Name, Age, Course. The records are: 101, John Doe, 20, Computer Science, 102, Jane Doe, 22, Mathematics. What is the total number of students studying Computer Science and Mathematics?
questions.hint: Hint: You need to perform a GROUP BY operation

questions.question: Insert the following records into the table: Employee ID, Name, Department, Salary. The records are: E001, John Smith, Sales, 50000, E002, Jane Smith, Marketing, 60000, E003, Bob Johnson, IT, 70000. What is the average salary of the employees in the Sales department?
questions.hint: Hint: You need to use the AVG() function

questions.question: Insert the following records into the table: Order ID, Customer Name, Order Date, Total. The records are: O001, John Doe, 2022-01-01, 1000, O002, Jane Doe, 2022-01-15, 2000, O003, Bob Smith, 2022-02-01, 500. What is the total revenue generated by John Doe and Jane Doe?
questions.hint: Hint: You need to use the GROUP BY and SUM() functions
